2605.02378.title: Enhancing Multimodal In-Context Learning via Inductive-Deductive Reasoning
2605.02378.paper_summary: In-context learning (ICL) allows large models to adapt to tasks using a few examples, yet its extension to vision-language models (VLMs) remains fragile. Our analysis reveals that the fundamental limitation lies in an inductive gap, models often produce correct answers from flawed reasoning, while struggling to extract consistent rules across demonstrations. This gap is further exacerbated by two visual-level obstacles: an overwhelming proportion of redundant visual tokens that obscure textual cues, and a skewed attention distribution that favors the initial image at the expense of subsequent context. To address these issues, we introduce a framework that restructures multimodal ICL as a principled inductive-deductive process. The framework incorporates a similarity-based visual token compression module to filter out redundant patches, a dynamic attention rebalancing mechanism to distribute focus equitably across all images, and a chain-of-thought paradigm that explicitly guides the model to analyze individual examples, derive a generalizable rule, and then apply it to the query. An auxiliary learning pipeline combines supervised fine-tuning with reinforcement learning using verifiable rewards to reinforce faithful citation and noise filtering. Evaluations across eight benchmarks covering visual perception, logical reasoning, STEM problems, and sarcasm detection demonstrate consistent and significant improvements over standard ICL baselines for multiple open-source VLMs, highlighting the potential of equipping models with genuine inductive capabilities in multimodal settings.
2605.02378.paper_summary_zh: 在上下文學習（ICL）中，大型模型能夠通過少量範例適應任務，但其在視覺-語言模型（VLMs）中的擴展仍然脆弱。<lb/>我們的分析顯示，根本的限制在於歸納差距，模型經常從有缺陷的推理中產生正確答案，而在提取一致的規則方面卻掙扎。<lb/>這一差距因兩個視覺層面的障礙而進一步加劇：過多的冗餘視覺標記掩蓋了文本線索，以及偏向初始圖像的偏斜注意力分佈，犧牲了後續的上下文。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，我們提出了一個框架，將多模態 ICL 重構為一個有原則的歸納-演繹過程。<lb/>該框架包含一個基於相似性的視覺標記壓縮模塊，用於過濾冗餘的區域，一個動態注意力重新平衡機制，用於在所有圖像之間公平地分配焦點，以及一個思維鏈範式，明確指導模型分析個別範例，推導出可概括的規則，然後將其應用於查詢。<lb/>輔助學習管道結合了使用可驗證獎勵的監督微調與強化學習，以加強忠實引用和噪聲過濾。<lb/>在涵蓋視覺感知、邏輯推理、STEM 問題和諷刺檢測的八個基準上的評估顯示，對多個開源 VLMs 的標準 ICL 基線有持續且顯著的改進，突顯了在多模態環境中賦予模型真正歸納能力的潛力。
2605.02378.author: Haoyu Wang et.al.
2605.02378.authors: Haoyu Wang, Haonan Wang, Yuyan Chen, Jun Chen, Gang Liu, Qian Wang, Jiahong Yan, Yanghua Xiao
